name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-58
title: scope-guard-on.py fallback repo_root uses .parent.parent.parent.parent (fragile)
description: scripts/scope-guard-on.py line 34: when both RABBIT_ROOT env var is unset AND git rev-parse fails, returns 'here.parent.parent.parent.parent'. 'here' is the script directory (.claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts), so 4 levels up = repo root — correct ONLY for that exact directory depth. If the script ever moves (or someone copies it to another tree), the fallback returns the wrong directory and proceeds to delete .rabbit-scope-override from the wrong location. Suggest: when fallbacks fail, error out with a clear message rather than guessing.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
